name: Assets Day 0 Technician Onboarding
description: Critical Day 0 assets management onboarding tasks

steps.title: Order and Ship Critical Equipment
steps.description: Order and ship essential equipment to new hire

substeps.title: Order and ship phone to new hire
substeps.description: Process order and arrange shipping of company mobile phone to new technician's address

substeps.title: Order and ship uniform to new hire
substeps.description: Process order and arrange shipping of company uniform to new technician's address

steps.title: System Updates and Communication
steps.description: Update systems and communicate with new technician

substeps.title: Update tech ID and phone number in TPMS
substeps.description: Update technician ID and assigned phone number in the TPMS system

substeps.title: Send a welcome email to the technician with all the details including tracking for phone and uniform
substeps.description: Send comprehensive welcome email with equipment tracking information, contact details, and next steps
